headline: Tuesday earnings to watch: Coca-Cola, GM, Robinhood, Starbucks
summary: Yahoo Finance's Josh Lipton takes a look at the top stories for investors to watch on Tuesday, Apr. 28. A huge slate of earnings is on deck, including Coca-Cola (KO), Spotify (SPOT), General Motors (GM), Starbucks (SBUX), and Robinhood (HOOD).The latest consumer confidence reading will be published in the morning.

headline: Robinhood Will Report Q1 Earnings on April 28. Options Market Bets on 10% Move in HOOD Stock
summary: U.S.-based Robinhood Markets (HOOD) is set to report its first-quarter results on Tuesday, April 28. The stock is down 25% year-to-date but remains up more than 70% over the past year. According to TipRanks’ Options Tool, options traders expect about a 10.06% move in either direction for HOOD stock following its Q1 earnings report. This implied move is higher than Robinhood’s average post-earnings move (in absolute terms) of 6.91% over the past four quarters.Claim 55% Off TipRanksUnlock hedge fu

headline: Robinhood Faces Looser Day Trading Rules And New Legal Uncertainty
summary: SEC eliminates the Pattern Day Trader rule, allowing unlimited day trades and broader margin access for retail accounts on platforms such as Robinhood and peers. Change takes effect immediately, reshaping how smaller traders can use margin and trade frequency on NasdaqGS:HOOD. Wisconsin Attorney General files a lawsuit claiming Robinhood's prediction market products are illegal gambling under state law. Twin regulatory moves arrive as Robinhood expands beyond traditional brokerage into new...
